hero.label: Made for SRE.ai
hero.headline: I want to help SRE.ai own the AI DevOps market.
hero.subheadline: SRE.ai is doing what Google did internally — now opening it to every engineering team. The $7.2M raise, ex-Google/DeepMind founders, and Claude/MCP stack puts you ahead of the curve. I want to be the person who gets that story in front of the right buyers.

whyCompany.title: You are building with the exact tools I have been learning
whyCompany.body: SRE.ai runs on Claude and MCP — the same AI infrastructure I have been tinkering with to build automated BDR systems. I understand the product category not just as a salesperson but as someone who has actually deployed AI agents in a GTM context.

whyCompany.title: Post-seed is the best time to join a GTM motion
whyCompany.body: With $7.2M raised and ex-Google/DeepMind credibility, the product is proven. What SRE.ai needs now is someone to help build the outbound engine and get enterprise DevOps teams on the phone. That is exactly where I live.

whyCompany.title: I have already done this from zero at an early-stage startup
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai I was the BDR building cold outreach from scratch — HubSpot, LinkedIn sequences, 15-20 paying clients acquired. I know what it takes to generate pipeline when there is no playbook yet. Then at NextAfter I saw the B2B consultancy side. Both experiences transfer directly to a Founding GTM role.

quote: I am not looking for a job with a clear job description. I want to be the person who figures out how SRE.ai gets its first 50 enterprise customers. That ambiguity is exactly what I am built for.
